\tzpentry{ID4547}{Coupled Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4547 introduces Coupled Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \hat{H}_{\alpha} = \left[ \frac{(\mathbf{P} - q\mathbf{A})^2}{2m_{\alpha}} + V_{\text{Coulomb}} \right] \otimes \exp(i \theta_{\text{twist}} \cdot \sigma \cdot \mathbf{L}) \end{equation}
